title: Blog Post on Time Management for Students
scenario: Write a blog post on time management tips for college students. The post should be 400-500 words, include actionable tips, and be informative and engaging.
constraints: Must include at least 5 actionable tips for improving time management.
Must include examples and anecdotes to illustrate the tips.
Must be written in a conversational tone.

evaluationCriteria.description: Are the time management tips accurate and relevant?
Is the tone conversational and engaging?
Are the examples and anecdotes accurate and relevant?
